discussion_comments.comment_body: get size from raw byte array rather than later on from encoded rune string

this is going to be a problem if the log file becomes very large as we don't want to read it all into memory.  reading exactly the "n" last lines of a file is a hard problem.  in this case it might be easier to just run `tail -n [lines] wavesrv.log` and capture the output.

Currently markdown id makes it so that only the most recent query will be part of the selection. 
I did this initially because I figured the past queries wouldn't be relevant and I thought it had potential for a big memory load, but I think we might want to rethink this and just have every code block generated as part of this selection
